title: Testing Imitation Learning Without Expert Data and Adding Contextual RL Variables to CartPole and Breakout
summary: Modified CartPole and Breakout environments to expose physical parameters for contextual RL experiments. Ran imitation learning experiments without expert data, using best-segment selection, and observed mixed results: solved CartPole and Pong instantly, partially solved Breakout, but failed on harder tasks. Also planned further off-policy research and benchmark design.
